BatchGetServiceLevelObjectiveBudgetRepor.description: Grants permission to batch retrieve a service level objective budget report

BatchUpdateExclusionWindows.description: Grants permission to add or remove exclusion windows from Amazon CloudWatch SLOs

CreateServiceLevelObjective.description: Grants permission to create a service level objective

DeleteGroupingConfiguration.description: Grants permission to delete a grouping configuration

DeleteServiceLevelObjective.description: Grants permission to delete a service level objective

GetService.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about a service

GetServiceLevelObjective.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about service level objective

Link.description: Grants permission to share Application Signals resources with a monitoring account

ListAuditFindings.description: Grants permission to list service auditing results

ListEntityEvents.description: Grants permission to list events for an entity

ListGroupingAttributeDefinitions.description: Grants permission to list grouping attribute configurations

ListObservedEntities.description: Grants permission to list entities associated with other entities

ListServiceDependencies.description: Grants permission to list service dependencies

ListServiceDependents.description: Grants permission to list service dependents

ListServiceLevelObjectiveExclusionWindow.description: Grants permission to list exclusion windows for an Amazon CloudWatch SLO

ListServiceLevelObjectives.description: Grants permission to list service level objectives

ListServiceOperations.description: Grants permission to list service operations

ListServiceStates.description: Grants permission to list service states

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for an Amazon CloudWatch SLO

PutGroupingConfiguration.description: Grants permission to create or update a grouping configuration

StartDiscovery.description: Grants permission to enable CloudWatch discovery

TagResource.description: Grants permission to add tags to an Amazon CloudWatch SLO

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag to an Amazon CloudWatch SLO

UpdateServiceLevelObjective.description: Grants permission to update a service level objective

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the allowed set of values for each of the tags

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tag-value associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the presence of mandatory tags in the request
